sales.title: Ira & Larry Goldberg Coins & Collectibles - Auction 150, Lot 424 — Britain, Regni-Atrebates. Ca. 60-20 BC. Gold Stater (5.64g) 21mm. Obverse blank. Reverse: Charioteer, horse, wheel. NGC Choice XF; Strike: 4/5, Surface: 3/5.  Plenty of luster remains and lightly tone
sales.description:
Britain, Regni-Atrebates. Ca. 60-20 BC. Gold Stater (5.64g) 21mm. Obverse blank. Reverse: Charioteer, horse, wheel. NGC Choice XF; Strike: 4/5, Surface: 3/5.  Plenty of luster remains and lightly toned.  Estimated Value $750 - UP
Ex The Peter Preovolos Collection....

sales.title: Ira & Larry Goldberg Coins & Collectibles - Auction 150, Lot 425 — Britain, Corieltavi, ca. 55/45 BC (or later). Gold Stater (5.59g) 19mm. Devolved Apollo head. Reverse: disjointed horse. NGC AU; Strike: 4/5, Surface: 3/5.  A choice example for this Celtic issue.  Es

Britain, Corieltavi, ca. 55/45 BC (or later). Gold Stater (5.59g) 19mm. Devolved Apollo head. Reverse: disjointed horse. NGC AU; Strike: 4/5, Surface: 3/5.  A choice example for this Celtic issue.  Estimated Value $750 - UP
Ex The Peter Preovolos Collection....
